headline: Vicor (VICR) Following AI Growth And JPMorgan Interest Looks Hard To Value
summary: Vicor stock reacts to AI driven growth story and fresh institutional interest Vicor (VICR) has been drawing attention after strong AI focused earnings, raised revenue guidance, and a new disclosure that JPMorgan controls a 6.9% stake in the company’s common stock. See our latest analysis for Vicor. Even after the recent pullback, with the share price down 11.45% over the last day and 28.10% over the past month, Vicor still shows strong momentum.
